ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_statuses" (
  "component_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_groups" (
  "parameter_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component datasheet */,
  "component_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_status_id") REFERENCES component_statuses ("component_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_parameter_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_group_id") REFERENCES parameter_groups ("parameter_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter template */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component type */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_templates_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_templates_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter for the component */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter for the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_components" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter for the revision */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter for the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id", "component_id", "parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revision_history" (
  "revision_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision history entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revision_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revision_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revision_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "revision_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revision_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revision_comments_revision_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_history_id") REFERENCES component_revision_history ("revision_history_id")
)
